title: gilia concinna
intro: Gilia concinna, also known as sticky gilia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gilia concinna include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Gilia concinna can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
